_authoring_notes: Section 4 — Next Summit gold callout. REFACTORED 2026-04-26 to Option B.

Outer Elementor container is boxed (1100px) with NO background — the gold visual comes from .fsi-callout-gold inside the HTML widget. Outer just provides padding for vertical breathing room above/below the callout card.
Removed my prior gold-bg outer container + Heading widgets + button widgets — all of that is now in the HTML chunk. The .fsi-callout-gold class handles bg, padding, border-radius.

settings.html:
Next Summit

Spring 2027 | Washington D.C.

The 2027 Legal League Servicer Summit will be hosted at The National Press Club in Washington D.C. during Government Forum Week, creating a single week in the capital for the legal and servicing communities to engage directly with the regulatory and policy environment shaping the industry.

Firms attending Government Forum can extend their week to include the Summit without a second trip. Attorneys attending the Summit gain access to the Government Forum conversations happening the same week.

Registration opens in winter 2026. Legal League members receive priority registration.

Get Summit Updates
Learn about Government Forum →
